name: hoc/stat-card
description: A dashboard metric card HOC that displays a numeric KPI value, a label, an optional trend indicator (up/down percentage), and a sparkline or icon accent. Provides StatCard, StatCardValue, StatCardLabel, StatCardTrend, and StatCardIcon primitives with responsive sizing, theme-aware color coding for positive/negative trends, and Skeleton placeholders for loading states. Composed of Card, Badge, and Icons with full ConfigProvider locale support.
useCases: Admin dashboard grids showing Monthly Revenue, Active Users, Conversion Rate, and Churn
E-commerce analytics panels displaying Orders, Average Order Value, and Return Rate cards
SaaS health-monitoring widgets for API latency, error rate, throughput, and uptime stats
Marketing campaign dashboards summarizing impressions, clicks, CTR, and cost-per-conversion
usage: import { StatCard, StatCardValue, StatCardLabel, StatCardTrend, StatCardIcon } from "shadcn-solid-components/hoc/stat-card"
